## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss updated content strategy, content OS, and next steps for Clerk's content marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Updated content strategy focuses on non-branded keywords, combining high-intent with mid/top-funnel educational content](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Five topical clusters identified: authentication fundamentals, software comparisons, user management/B2B features, React/Next.js, and AI/modern development](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Next steps include selecting a blog post to calibrate voice/tone and reviewing content assignments in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [Clerk to provide additional support data and brand assets for featured image creation](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Combines high-intent keywords with mid/top-funnel educational content](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Focuses on non-branded keywords to leverage Clerk's strong brand authority](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Goals include addressing Discord support issues, building momentum around modern development priorities](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Tactical KPIs: traffic (SEO + LLM), attributable signups (aiming for \>10% from Answer Engines)](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

### Topical Clusters

1.  Authentication Fundamentals (High Priority)
    
      - [Educates on basic authentication, best practices, and secure workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Targets good keywords with significant traffic potential](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

2.  Software Comparisons (High Priority)
    
      - [Covers competitive analysis, build vs. buy decisions](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Includes both non-branded and tactical themes (e.g., "Clerk vs." or "Alternative to Auth0")](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

3.  User Management and B2B Features (Medium Priority)
    
      - [Showcases Clerk's platform capabilities, including billing features](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [Focuses on pain points and jobs-to-be-done approach](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

4.  React and Next.js (Medium Priority)
    
      - [Targets developers using React for simple apps and Next.js for more complex systems](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [Will require input from Brian for technical depth and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

5.  AI and Modern Development (Medium Priority)
    
      - [Educates indie hackers and web coders on lean development approaches](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [Aligns with Clerk's upcoming features catering to this audience](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

### Content Production and Review Process

  - [GrowthX to generate first blog post next week for voice/tone calibration](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Clerk team to review and approve content assignments in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Discussion on featured image creation: potential collaboration between GrowthX's AI-generated images and Clerk's in-house design team](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

### Data and Analytics

  - [Clerk to provide more focused support data from Discord (1 year of data)](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
  - [Exploration of using BigQuery for better attribution insights](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Plan to create Looker dashboard combining GSC and GA4 data for comprehensive traffic analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alex to send additional support data and comparison draft](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)

  - [Alex to introduce GrowthX team to Clerk's design lead for asset creation collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Select one blog post for voice/tone calibration](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Imogen workflow for featured image generation](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Clerk to provide brand assets for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and refining priority prompts in Scrunch for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ByKQUowH8BkSzEnrJtzNWYZjWi-wPZi_?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
